title: derris ferruginea
intro: Derris ferruginea, also known as the poisonous ironplow tree or ironplow bean, is a plant species in the pea family that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Derris ferruginea include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a purgative. Derris ferruginea is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, and has been traditionally used in African herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
